programme.title: Bitten

programme.title: Road to Nowhere
programme.desc: Dave and Cody portray travelers who get stuck on a desolate road in Maine.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Wide Open: New Mexico Antelope
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and friend Cody Lujan head to Northeastern New Mexico to hunt pronghorn antelope, the fastest big game animal in the United States. In the wide open desert plains, Steve will have to work hard to stalk within range of a mature buck. The payoff will be antelope loin topped with local New Mexico chiles.

programme.title: MeatEater - Primal Cuts: Bone-in Cooking Special
programme.desc: In this cooking special, Steven Rinella shows his fans some of his favorite preparations for big, bone-in cuts of red meat. Interspersed with highlights from his recent caribou, buffalo, and mule deer hunts, the show features recipes that utilize some of the most underappreciated parts of big game animals. This episode is an attractive and delicious tribute to Steve's gun-to-table ethic.

programme.title: MeatEater - El Venado Blanco: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his favorite hunting grounds of Sonora, Mexico to hunt for a Coues deer buck during the peak rutting season. Steve sets up camp and spends days glassing mountains and canyons for these elusive, wary desert whitetails. Meanwhile, his hunting partner, Remi Warren, attempts the difficult task of stalking one with a bow. To cap off the hunt, Steve cooks a batch of venison ribs braised in a Dutch oven buried beneath hot coals.

programme.title: MeatEater - Clash of the Titans: Northern California Pig & Deer
programme.desc: In this episode, Steven Rinella joins forces with fellow hunter and wild game chef Hank Shaw in the hills of Central California to go after Columbia blacktail deer, wild pigs, and a handful of small game species that are in season. The end result is a culinary smorgasbord of epic proportions.

programme.title: MeatEater - Sea Bear: Alaska Spring Bear and Seafood
programme.desc: Steve ventures out to his hunting and fishing shack on a remote coastline of southeast Alaska's Prince of Wales Island. While hunting bears from a skiff and a canoe, Steve gathers a variety of prime seafood and makes a discovery about his own motivations as a bear hunter.

programme.title: MeatEater - Full Boar: Whole Hog Cooking Special
programme.desc: Steven Rinella breaks down an entire boar and shares some of his favorite recipes in this Cooking Special. Matt Weingarter helps steve make head cheese, pork skin cracklins, smoked pork butt, and a tied-roast boned-out ham. Each dish requires thoughtful butchering, processing, and cooking to execute to perfection.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bull by Boat: British Columbia Moose
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ryan Callaghan float a remote river on a bull moose hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Local Motion: Montana Bull Elk
programme.desc: Steve must deal with bad weather and fierce competition during a late-season central Montana elk hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Northern Rockies: British Columbia Grizzly Part 1
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ryan Callaghan, a British Columbia guide, hike into the steep backcountry of northern British Columbia in search of grizzlies and black bears. Among the beutiful alpine vista, this adventure includes some intense and up-close bear action ‚Äì almost too close.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Northern Rockies: British Columbia Grizzly Part 2
programme.desc: Steve and his buddy Ryan Callaghan, a British Columbia guide, hike into the steep backcountry of northern British Columbia in search of grizzlies and black bears. Among the beutiful alpine vista, this adventure includes some intense and up-close bear action ‚Äì almost too close.

programme.title: MeatEater - Opening Day: Wisconsin Whitetail Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his buddy Doug Duren give comedians Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen their first taste.

programme.title: MeatEater - Opening Day: Wisconsin Whitetail Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his buddy Doug Duren hunt with Joe Rogan.

programme.title: MeatEater - Spring Break: Florida Osceola Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his friend and wild turkey specialist, Robert Abernathy, head to southern Florida to hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Boone and Bugles: Kentucky Bull Elk
programme.desc: Steven Rinella is invited by the Rocky Mountain Elk Foundation for a special opportunity to hunt elk during the rut in the mountainous coal country of southeastern Kentucky, a place where his hero Daniel Boone once roamed. This is Steve's first eastern elk hunt, and he quickly realizes that the rules of the game here are different. If he manages to track one down, he'll prepare what was supposedly Boone's favorite meal: elk liver.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cold Water: Alaskan Seafood Cooking Special
programme.desc: Join Steve on this Cooking Special as he dives into the best of Alaskan seafood, featuring shrimp, crab, fish, and clams. Learn how to make easy, delicious seafood recipes that showcase the fresh flavors of the sea. Whether you're a seasoned cook or a beginner, Steve's simple steps will help you prepare mouthwatering dishes that capture the essence of Alaskan waters.

programme.title: MeatEater - Big Buck Dreams: Colorado Mule Deer
programme.desc: Steve's annual quest for a giant mule deer buck continues this year in southwest Colorado. Here, Steve fills us in on his favorite critter, the mule deer. As he hunts will share his vast knowledge about these special western game animals including how to hunt, butcher, and most importantly how cook them-if he can put his tag on one.

programme.title: MeatEater - Surf N Turk: Wisconsin Turkey and Carp
programme.desc: Steven Rinella scratches his spring turkey itch this year as he visits Southeast Wisconsin to call in some big eastern Toms with his buddy Jerod Fink. The guys also plan to do some bow fishing after dark so they can enjoy a real Midwest turkey and fish fry.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Best Start - Wild Game Breakfast Cooking Special
programme.desc: Breakfast is the most important meal of the day, but is often overlooked by wild game cooks at home. Following a series of successful hunts across North America this past fall, Steve demonstrates how to cook a variety of breakfast classics using wild game ingredients‚Äîincluding black bear bacon, which Steve has never tried before.

programme.title: MeatEater - Gila Monster: New Mexico Bull Elk
programme.desc: After four years of waiting, Steven Rinella draws a coveted, limited-entry public land bull elk tag for New Mexico's Gila National Forest. Steve heads into the backcountry on a solo backpack hunt where his biggest challenge is the vast expanse of hills covered in thick timber. This demanding hunt requires lots of glassing and even more hiking. Here, even just one missed opportunity could result in an empty freezer.

programme.title: MeatEater - Hearts of Darkness: Ticker Cooking Special
programme.desc: While its considered a long-standing hunting tradition to eat the heart of your first kill, the heart.

programme.title: What Do You Bring to the Table?
programme.desc: America’s Test Kitchen is an institution for home cooks everywhere, testing recipes to perfection and sharing those tasty results with the world. For the first time ever, 11 passionate home cooks compete in the job interview of a lifetime. The winner has a chance to join the ATK cast, author a cookbook, and earn $100,000! Hosted by Jeannie Mai Jenkins, this competition is about to be lit!

programme.title: It’s All in the Details
programme.desc: Now that the cooks have made a crucial first impression, the pressure ramps up in the ATK kitchen. For the Task Challenge, contestants choose a Dutch oven that contains a mystery side dish, which they’ll recreate down to the very last detail. Then, for the Test Challenge, each cook receives a protein and a specific cooking technique, which they’ll have to incorporate in their final dish.

programme.title: Keep it Simple
programme.desc: The competition really starts to heat up, as the ten remaining home cooks battle it out to stay in the competition. For their Task Challenge, the contestants must create a gourmet appetizer that includes at least three frozen ingredients. Then, for the Test Challenge, things get even trickier, when the competitors must transform a difficult “fussy dish” into a weeknight recipe.

programme.title: Entertaining is for Everyone
programme.desc: Nine cooks remain and the stakes are rising as the home cooks prove they have what it takes to remain in the competition. For the Task challenge, the cooks must prepare a themed food board with at least two cooked elements. Then for the Test challenge, the home cooks are asked to create two appetizers that represent who they are and where they are from on a plate.

programme.title: Capítulo 24
programme.desc: Miguel finds Celina dancing and tells her to confront Mia. After, Roberta and Miguel expose Mia for not wanting Celina to be part of the dance group.

programme.title: Capítulo 25
programme.desc: The Lodge beats Nico up. Roberta's dance group beats Mia's at the auditions. Celina doesn't want to be Mia's friend anymore. Diego finds Marcelino.

programme.title: Capítulo 26
programme.desc: Roberta becomes Diego's slave for fear he'll tell on her. Pascual tells Vico she must leave the school. Mia and Roberta fight in the middle of class.

programme.title: Capítulo 27
programme.desc: Celina tells Miguel she is going to kill herself if he leaves her. The dance teacher wants Mia back in the group. Roberta's with Mia in favor of Vico.

programme.title: Capítulo 28
programme.desc: Alma finds out Lupita's been taking Roberta's place during counseling. Celina confronts Mia over Miguel. Leon tells Diego to put Roberta in her place.

programme.title: Capítulo 29
programme.desc: Mia's punished for leading the protest in favor of Vico. Marcelino shows Roberta how much he loves her. Mia and Miguel find Celina in very bad shape.

programme.title: Capítulo 30
programme.desc: Mia tries to kiss Miguel but gets cold feet. Alma asks Roberta what she's been spending so much money on. Both Roberta and Mia like the new student.

programme.title: Capítulo 31
programme.desc: Mia's not allowed out and so her date's ruined. Miguel gets Celina to understand they have to split. Roberta has a plan to get out of Diego's grip.

programme.title: Capítulo 32

programme.title: Regresen a mis hijos

programme.title: Vamos al cine
programme.desc: Los P. Luche van a pasar un rato de ocio en el cine tras insistencias de Federica. Ya en la sala de cine, las personas tienen que lidiar con la familia hablando durante la función, algo que incomoda a Bibi y despierta la reacción del público contra ella.

programme.title: Número equivocado
programme.desc: Alguien grafiteó la fachada del edificio. Para retirarlo, Germán cambia el número de la entrada. ¿Recibirá Luis el paquete que espera? ¿Acudirán a pintar el departamento de Lorena?

programme.title: Magdalena y la tercera edad
programme.desc: Magdalena descubre que las personas de tercera edad recibirán tarjetas de ayuda. La familia López Pérez intenta obtener el beneficio. A Luis le molesta que Benito tenga un auto nuevo.

programme.title: Cásate conmigo
programme.desc: Comienza una guerra tras la pelea entre Silvia y Luis, sin embargo él le pide matrimonio. Lorena le pide a Germán que arregle una mesa.

programme.title: La boda
programme.desc: Luis y Silvia anuncian su boda y los vecinos los convencerán para que se casen en el edificio y ayudarán a los preparativos.

programme.title: Vecinos ruidosos
programme.desc: Los vecinos se quejan de los ruidos que vienen del departamento de Luis y Silvita, Germán intenta reparar la tubería de Lorena y los López Pérez sufren de comezón.

programme.title: Frankie regresa
programme.desc: Frankie regresa a vivir al edificio, con Lorena y con Benito, pero con la condición de que encuentre trabajo. Pero, en vez de eso, escribirá una nueva película.

programme.title: La llegada de Vanesa
programme.desc: Vanesa vuelve al edificio para visitar a los Vecinos y ponerse al corriente. Benito invita a su novia a "ver pelis" en el departamento, al enterarse de que sus papás saldrán.

programme.title: La cocina de Silvita
programme.desc: Como Luis le ha preparado el desayuno, Silvita se encargará de prepararle a su esposo un platillo espectacular.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: La cosas de Don Roque
programme.desc: Germán le entrega a Vanessa cosas que le dejó don Roque, por lo que ambos lo recuerdan y homenajean. Lorena aprecia a Soledad, la nueva amiga de Benito.

programme.title: El tamalero
programme.desc: Como el tamalero no deja dormir a Luis, este le pedirá que le baje a su bocina. Ve cuántos enemigos se echará encima, por dejar sin trabajo al tamalero.

programme.title: Los paramédicos
programme.desc: Por pedirle a Morris que ponga en su tarea que son paramédicos, Rocko y Ale deben ir a la escuela a dar un curso de primeros auxilios. Llegan nuevos vecinos al departamento 301.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: Los ex
programme.desc: Luis le pide a Silvita que deje de hablar con su ex, pues se siente incómodo, sin sospechar que Maru, ex de Luis, llegará a la puerta de su casa. Además, la obra de arte de Jorjais.

programme.title: El cumpleaños de Germán
programme.desc: Todos se olvidan del cumpleaños de Germán, a pesar de estar invitados a la fiesta. Lorena y Frankie le dicen a Benito que volverá a los castings.

programme.title: La amiga incómoda
programme.desc: La amiga de Silvita se queda en el departamento de los recién casados, ya que se ha quedado sin casa. Además, Magda trata de convencer a los vecinos para que acepten poner un anuncio en la fachada del edificio.

programme.title: El nuevo reglamento
programme.desc: Los Rivers solo tienen dinero para comer atún. Así que Frankie envía a Benito a hacer el casting para interpretar al Sol. Pero Luis propone realizar un nuevo reglamento de convivencia vecinal.

programme.title: La historia de Jorjáis
programme.desc: Jorjáis cuenta su verdadera historia, y hará llorar a más de uno. Mientras tanto, como Frankie y Lorena no están en casa, Benito y Liz aprovecharán para hacer algo en su ausencia.

programme.title: Cantante grupero
programme.desc: Vítor and Albertano are two decent but very conceited best friends who are going for the same goals: to find good jobs, nice places to live, and true love.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: He Answered
programme.desc: Pastor Steven gives us three things to remember when life is hard. The enemy wants to keep us circling the wilderness, but God will bring us through as we learn to repeat what leads us to victory.

programme.title: Elevation Church Live
programme.desc: Welcome to Elevation Church. See what God can do through you.

programme.title: Your Label Is Lying
programme.desc: This sermon is for someone who has been hearing the same lies from the enemy for so long that you've started to believe them. But you are not your issue. You are not your bad decision. It's time to interrupt your story with truth and leave the lies.

programme.title: I Thought It Was Through
programme.desc: When despair sets in, it's easy to assume it'll always be this way. But what if a shift in thinking could break that cycle? Your thoughts have the power to disrupt your despair.

programme.title: When God Gives A Thought To You
programme.desc: We live in a world that values things more than thoughts, so when God speaks to us, we don't always value it like we should. In this message, learn some of the ways God speaks, when to ask for it, and how to recognize it when He does.

programme.title: The Hardest Part Is Behind You
programme.desc: Don't judge any one part of your life in isolation or let unmet expectations define your future. God's not finished with your story, and He didn't bring you this far to let you turn back now.

programme.title: Not As Long As My Song!
programme.desc: Hitting your limit isn't a sign of weakness; it's an invitation to shift your perspective. When the enemy brings the battle to your mind, remember that he only attacks what's valuable. And God's goodness is your secret weapon to win the fight.

programme.title: Hand Him The Plan
programme.desc: Sometimes the battle in your mind is proof that God's trying to do something great in your heart. What you see isn't the full picture of what God has for you. When you hand God your plans, you make room for His purpose.

programme.title: Elevation Church Live
programme.desc: Welcome to Elevation Church. See what God can do through you.
